title: Cold-email outreach that actually books meetings (template + n8n flow)
content: Sharing the 3-touch cold-email sequence I package for clients: Touch 1 (day 0) open loop, Touch 2 (day 3) proof/social, Touch 3 (day 7) low-friction CTA. Built on Listmonk (free) + n8n. 95% margin, $450-700 setup + $99-149/mo retainer. Reply 'cold' if you want the n8n workflow JSON. #b2b #sales #coldemail #automation
